name: rapid-notes
title: Rapid Notes
description: Quickly capture notes: append a checklist item or a block under a heading, or create a new timestamped task or note file with YAML frontmatter — instantly or via an editable form.
author: smetdenis

commands.name: append
commands.title: Rapid - Append (silent)
commands.description: Instantly append the selected or typed text: a single line becomes a checklist item, multi-line text a note block — each under its own heading, grouped by date.

preferences.name: noteFile
preferences.title: Note File
preferences.description: Markdown file that multi-line captures (note blocks) are appended to.

preferences.name: noteHeading
preferences.title: Note Heading
preferences.description: Append note blocks under this heading (case-insensitive), grouped by date. Leading #s set the level; plain text is H1; empty puts the date group at the top of the file (below any frontmatter).

preferences.name: checklistFile
preferences.title: Checklist File
preferences.description: Markdown file that single-line captures (checklist items) are appended to.

preferences.name: checklistHeading
preferences.title: Checklist Heading
preferences.description: Append checklist items under this heading (case-insensitive), grouped by date. Leading #s set the level; plain text is H1; empty puts the date group at the top of the file (below any frontmatter).

preferences.name: useSelection
preferences.title: Selection
preferences.label: Merge the selected text into the capture
preferences.description: When on, the frontmost app's selected text is read and merged into the captured content. When off (default), the selection is never read — pass text as the argument instead. In a GPU terminal the selection is read via the clipboard (copy-on-select).

preferences.name: useClipboard
preferences.title: Clipboard
preferences.label: Merge the clipboard into the capture
preferences.description: When on, the clipboard is read and merged into the captured content. When off, the clipboard is never read.

commands.name: new-task
commands.title: Rapid - New task file
commands.description: Instantly create a new task file with YAML frontmatter in your task directory.

preferences.name: taskDirectory
preferences.title: Directory
preferences.description: Folder where new task files are created.

preferences.name: taskFrontmatter
preferences.title: Frontmatter
preferences.description: Extra YAML frontmatter as 'key: value; key2: value2'. Reserved keys (created, title, project, tags, source_url, updated) are set automatically and rejected here.

preferences.name: defaultTags
preferences.title: Default Tags
preferences.description: Comma-separated tags written to new task files.

preferences.name: useClipboard
preferences.title: Clipboard
preferences.label: Merge the clipboard into the capture
preferences.description: When on, the clipboard is read and merged into the captured content. When off, the clipboard is never read.

commands.name: new-note
commands.title: Rapid - New note file
commands.description: Instantly create a new note file with YAML frontmatter in your note directory.

preferences.name: noteDirectory
preferences.title: Directory
preferences.description: Folder where new note files are created.

preferences.name: noteFrontmatter
preferences.title: Frontmatter
preferences.description: Extra YAML frontmatter as 'key: value; key2: value2'. Reserved keys (created, title, project, tags, source_url, updated) are set automatically and rejected here.

preferences.name: defaultTags
preferences.title: Default Tags
preferences.description: Comma-separated tags written to new note files.

preferences.name: useClipboard
preferences.title: Clipboard
preferences.label: Merge the clipboard into the capture
preferences.description: When on, the clipboard is read and merged into the captured content. When off, the clipboard is never read.

commands.name: rapid-note
commands.title: Rapid - Form
commands.description: Capture with an editable form: append under a heading, or create a new task/note file — your choice, edited before saving.

preferences.name: appendNoteFile
preferences.title: Append: Note File
preferences.description: Markdown file the form appends multi-line captures to (note blocks) in Append mode.

preferences.name: appendNoteHeading
preferences.title: Append: Note Heading
preferences.description: Append note blocks under this heading (case-insensitive), grouped by date. Leading #s set the level; plain text is H1; empty puts the date group at the top of the file (below any frontmatter).

preferences.name: appendChecklistFile
preferences.title: Append: Checklist File
preferences.description: Markdown file the form appends single-line captures to (checklist items) in Append mode.

preferences.name: appendChecklistHeading
preferences.title: Append: Checklist Heading
preferences.description: Append checklist items under this heading (case-insensitive), grouped by date. Leading #s set the level; plain text is H1; empty puts the date group at the top of the file (below any frontmatter).

preferences.name: createDirectory
preferences.title: Create: Directory
preferences.description: Folder where the form creates a new file when 'Create' is selected.

preferences.name: createFrontmatter
preferences.title: Create: Frontmatter
preferences.description: Extra YAML frontmatter as 'key: value; key2: value2'. Reserved keys are set automatically and rejected here.

preferences.name: defaultTags
preferences.title: Default Tags
preferences.description: Comma-separated tags prefilled into the form's Tags field.

preferences.name: useClipboard
preferences.title: Clipboard
preferences.label: Merge the clipboard into the capture
preferences.description: When on, the clipboard is read and merged into the captured content. When off, the clipboard is never read.

preferences.name: dateFormat
preferences.title: Date Format
preferences.description: date-fns format for the frontmatter created and updated fields.

preferences.name: filenameDateFormat
preferences.title: Filename Date Format
preferences.description: date-fns format for new task/note filenames. Avoid characters invalid in filenames.

preferences.name: mergeSeparator
preferences.title: Merge Separator
preferences.description: How the typed argument, selection, and clipboard are joined into the captured content when more than one is present.
